description: The percentage labels on the pie slices use wildly inconsistent formatting: one slice shows no decimal places (e.g. "52%"), another shows three decimal places (e.g. "17.897%"), one slice has its label removed entirely, and the font sizes vary dramatically (from 8pt to 18pt). This makes it difficult to compare slices at a glance and gives the chart a haphazard, unprofessional appearance.
